title: Procurement Executive(Semiconductor Industry) @ Pasir Ris
description:
• MNC

  • 5 days' work week

  • 2 years' Contract(Renewable)

Responsibilities:

  • Support daily procurement and purchasing operations

  • Liaise with suppliers on quotations, pricing and order matters

  • Track purchase orders, deliveries, and follow up on payment enquiries with suppliers and internal teams

  • Perform data entry, reporting and basic market analysis

  • Assist with inventory control and logistics coordination

  • Ensure compliance with procurement procedures and documentation

  • Other ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Diploma or above in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering or related disciplines

  • 3-5 years of experience in Procurement or Supply chain operations
    (Semiconductor or Manufacturing industry preferred)

  • Work Location: Pasir Ris

  • Salary: Up to $3800

  • Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8.30am-6pm

  • Able to start work immediately or on short notice will be an advantage

  • Candidates currently in employment are welcome to apply

How to apply:

Interested applicants kindly state your Expected salary, Last drawn salary and Starting date.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

EA Personnel: Joanna Leow Jiayi

EA Reg ID: R1871786

EA Licence No.: 19C9603

postedCompany.description:
E-Cruit Team is a reputable and trusted recruitment agency committed to delivering effective staffing solutions to both individuals and organisations with urgency and dedication.

Founded with the vision of providing a specialised, high-quality recruitment experience, E-Cruit Team takes pride in offering a personalised and professional approach to every hiring need.

With a team of experienced consultants, we bring deep local recruitment expertise and market understanding to the table. This enables us to connect top talent with the right opportunities — efficiently and effectively.

Whether you’re an employer looking to build a reliable workforce or a candidate seeking the right job fit, E-Cruit Team is here to support you every step of the way.

 

Our services includes:

  • Local Recruitment (Permanent) 
  • Contract and temporary staffing (Temp & Contract) 
  • Various work pass application
  • Event Support Manpower solutions 
  • Payroll services

 

E-Cruit Team, Recruit with confidence!
